testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.description: Over 500 clients trust us. Read their opinions and see why you should choose our cleaning services.

anna.name: Anna Kowalska
anna.content: I've been using Dom Blasku services for a year. Fantastic quality and punctuality. I recommend it to everyone!

marek.name: Marek Nowak
marek.content: We work with Dom Blasku for our office building. Professionalism at the highest level.

katarzyna.name: Katarzyna Wiśniewska
katarzyna.content: Reliable and flexible. They respond to every need. Guests praise the cleanliness of the rooms.

piotr.name: Piotr Zieliński
piotr.content: After several attempts with other companies, I finally found Dom Blasku. Quality and price perfect.

blog.title: Knowledge and Inspiration
blog.description: Expert tips, case studies, and trends in the cleaning industry

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions About Cleaning
faq.description: Find answers to the most common questions about our cleaning services. If you don't find an answer, contact us.
faq.contactUs: Contact us by phone or email. We'll be happy to answer all your questions.

order.question: How do I order a cleaning service?
order.answer: Simply call +48 575 743 443 or fill out the contact form on our website. We'll respond within 24 hours and schedule a free quote.

quote.question: Is the quote free?
quote.answer: Yes, the quote is completely free and non-binding. We'll come, assess the scope of work, and present a detailed price offer.

products.question: What cleaning products do you use?
products.answer: We use only certified, eco-friendly cleaning products that are safe for people, animals, and the environment.

equipment.question: Do you have your own equipment?
equipment.answer: Yes, we come with full equipment - professional vacuums, mops, cleaning products, and all necessary accessories.

hours.question: Can you clean in the evenings or on weekends?
hours.answer: Of course! We adapt to customer needs. We clean in the morning, evening, as well as on weekends and holidays.

satisfaction.question: What if I'm not satisfied with the service?
satisfaction.answer: We offer a satisfaction guarantee. If you're not satisfied, we'll come back and fix it at no extra cost within 24 hours.

invoice.question: Do you issue VAT invoices?
invoice.answer: Yes, we are a registered VAT payer and issue invoices for companies and receipts for individuals.

insurance.question: Do you have insurance?
insurance.answer: Yes, we have full liability insurance that protects both us and our clients in case of any damage during the service.
